name: regression-diff-triage-agent
description: Diagnoses why API regression tests broke by diffing before/after Newman runs and classifying root cause.

scripts.run:after: node mock-api/inject-failures.js && newman run collections/bookstore.postman_collection.json -e collections/env.postman_environment.json -r json --reporter-json-export fixtures/after.json
scripts.demo: npm run start:api & sleep 1 && npm run run:before && npm run run:after && npm run triage
